exported_symbols.name: subscribeDirectMessageNotifications
exported_symbols.signature: (params: { ndk: NDK; ownPubkeyHex: string; privateKeyHex: string }) => () => void
changes: ADDED privateKeyHex parameter — required to unwrap NIP-17 kind-1059 gift wraps
RETURN TYPE unchanged — still () => void cleanup function

new_module_state.name: seenRumorIds
new_module_state.keyed_on: inner rumor id (rumor.id) — NOT outer wrap id (event.id)
new_module_state.reason: Outer id changes per relay redelivery; rumor id is stable across redeliveries (D7)

new_module_state.name: seenMessageIds
new_module_state.keyed_on: event id (event.id) — unchanged from original code
new_module_state.reason: kind-4 outer event = the DM itself; stable across deliveries

new_subscriptions.purpose: NIP-17 gift-wrapped DMs — NIP-59 wraps addressed to local pubkey

kind-4.events_handled: NDKEvent with kind===4 and #p tag === ownPubkeyHex

kind-1059.events_handled: NDKEvent with kind===1059 and #p tag === ownPubkeyHex
filter_chain: rumor.kind === 14 (NIP-17 chat message) — only this kind bumps the bell
silent_skips: unwrapAndOpen throws → logger.info('dm:unwrap-failed') — foreign key, not addressed to us, malformed
shouldIngestRumor returns false → logger.info('dm:rumor-rejected') — wrong peer
rumor.kind !== 14 → no log, just return (kind-7, kind-444, kind-21059)
rumor.pubkey === own → no log, just return
createdMs <= lastRead → no log, just return

DirectMessageNotificationsWatcher.tsx.change: pass privateKeyHex (from useNostrIdentity()) as third parameter to subscribeDirectMessageNotifications

test_contracts.mock_strategy: fake NDK (subscribe returns { filter, handlers[], stop }) with emitEvent helper; mock unwrapAndOpen, shouldIngestRumor, incrementDirectMessage, rememberContact
